entry.event: why the fuck didnt anyone tell me i would be put under the spotlight - i really dont do speaches!
Im off to the limelight - lets see if i can remain sober AND have a good time - heres hoping.

I didnt even get into the limelight... I queued for quite a while, cos i had nothing better to do, I got to the very front, then was told they were closed and werent lettin anyone else in. Sucks.
But in a way im glad - didnt really wanna go out tonight anyway.

entry.subject: yay
entry.event: Oh boy oh boy isnt christmas fun. I did have lots of fun yes yes i did!

entry.subject: green fairy my ass!
entry.event: two and a half shots of absinthe, and about 4 vodka and cokes I was still sober. And im not happy about that at all. The reason for the half is cos it got spewed on the floor, as has happened before, cos it has such a strong taste, but for some reason didnt get me drunk. Rachel had one and some beers and came back pissed - I didnt reach that point all night. Its not bloody fair. Another reason why im gettin sick of the club atmosphere. STOP GOING TO THE LIMELIGHT!
